_ai: AI fills this. Derived from: bounded-contexts.json + user-journeys.json + architecture.json. Do not edit manually.

events.name: tenant.registered
events.trigger: Business owner submits registration form (UJ001 step 1)

events.name: tenant.provisioned
events.trigger: All provisioning steps (billing subscription, config initialisation) confirmed (UJ001 step 2)

events.name: tenant.config.updated
events.trigger: Tenant admin updates cancellation policy, booking window, or max advance bookings (FR002)

events.name: tenant.suspended
events.trigger: Platform operator initiates tenant suspension (FR013)

events.name: tenant.deprovisioned
events.trigger: Platform operator initiates deprovisioning after 30-day suspension window (FR013, BR011)

events.name: appointment.requested
events.trigger: Customer submits a booking request — emitted before saga completion (UJ002 step 5)
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.confirmed
events.trigger: All saga steps succeed: slot reserved + payment captured + event written (UJ002 step 7)
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.failed
events.trigger: Saga step fails — slot unavailable (409) or payment failed (402) — after compensation applied
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.cancelled
events.trigger: Customer or admin requests cancellation within policy window; policy validation passed (UJ003 step 2)
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.rescheduled
events.trigger: New slot confirmed and original slot released (UJ004 step 5)
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.completed
events.trigger: System or staff marks appointment as completed after the slot end time passes
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.no_show
events.trigger: Staff or system marks appointment as no-show after slot time elapses without check-in
events.channel: SNS → SQS per consumer (via Transactional Outbox)

events.name: appointment.slot_released
events.trigger: Slot lock is lifted as part of cancellation or rescheduling saga — emitted immediately, independent of refund outcome (BR009)

events.name: payment.captured
events.trigger: Stripe payment capture succeeds during booking saga
events.channel: Direct callback to booking-command-service saga orchestrator (synchronous RPC within saga boundary)

events.name: payment.capture_failed
events.trigger: Stripe payment capture fails — insufficient funds, card declined, provider error
events.channel: Direct callback to booking-command-service saga orchestrator (synchronous RPC within saga boundary)

events.name: payment.refund_requested
events.trigger: appointment.cancelled emitted with refund_required=true

events.name: payment.refund_completed
events.trigger: Stripe refund confirmed

events.name: payment.refund_failed
events.trigger: Stripe refund fails after retry exhaustion — routes to DLQ for manual ops resolution (BR009)

events.name: notification.sent
events.trigger: Notification successfully delivered to recipient via channel (email, SMS, WhatsApp)

events.name: notification.dlq_routed
events.trigger: Notification delivery fails after 4 retry attempts with exponential backoff (FR007)

events.name: analytics.velocity_spike_detected
events.trigger: Booking velocity for a tenant exceeds 3x their 5-minute historical average (FR009)

events.name: analytics.cancellation_rate_alert
events.trigger: Cancellation rate exceeds 30% over the last 50 bookings for a tenant (FR009)

events.name: dlq.event_requeued
events.trigger: Platform operator inspects a DLQ entry and re-queues the corrected event for reprocessing (UJ006 step 5)

events.name: dlq.event_discarded
events.trigger: Platform operator discards a DLQ entry after determining it cannot be reprocessed (UJ006 step 5)

events.name: tenant.export_ready
events.trigger: Tenant data export archive generation completes; signed S3 URL ready (FR012)
